feed.title: Fountain Codes: a way to reduce blockchain storage costs

entry.title: Fountain Codes: a way to reduce blockchain storage costs
entry.summary:
The discussion highlights the inefficiencies of using low-density parity check codes, which do not necessarily address the primary limiting factors in data transmission and sharing. Instead, these methods introduce additional computational overheads that could potentially slow down processes rather than optimizing them. This perspective is grounded in historical context; similar ideas have been dismissed in the past due to their ineffectiveness at addressing core issues like bandwidth limitations.
Moreover, the email touches on the constraints imposed by peer limits, which restrict more extensive miner sharing. This limitation is critical as it directly impacts the scalability and functional capabilities of data handling systems. The sender acknowledges having addressed several lesser concerns but concedes that the major unresolved issue remains a significant bottleneck. This admission underscores an ongoing challenge in achieving more efficient system performance without incurring unnecessary data or computational costs.
